visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a brown ruffle-sleeved top and black skirt, stands in the aisle of a Costco warehouse. She holds a large box of 'Garlic & Cheese Pull Apart Brioches'. Behind her, metal shelving is stacked with red boxes of bakery goods under bright industrial lighting. (2) The camera zooms in on the product box, showing a close-up of the brioche illustration and the 'Chateau Fougeres' brand logo. The woman's hands point to the bread on the packaging. (3) Back to a medium shot, the woman continues talking, gesturing toward the box. Large yellow and pink text overlays appear on the upper part of the frame. (4) The scene cuts to an indoor living room setting. The woman is joined by another woman wearing a blue off-the-shoulder top and a grey bucket hat. They sit at a white table with the baked bread on a tray and the box beside them. (5) Close-up shot of the bread on a black tray, appearing golden-brown with cheese on top. (6) The two women interact, pulling apart pieces of the bread and showing the inside to the camera. They exhibit facial expressions of disappointment and skepticism. (7) A split screen displays the bread on the tray on the left and the product box on the right, as they compare reality to the packaging. (8) The two women continue their discussion indoors, shaking their heads and giving thumbs-down gestures toward the camera.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Slogan]: 不能只有我吃到！快分享!. [Variety]: 大蒜乾酪布里歐. (2) [Subtitle]: 549元. (3) [Subtitle]: 看起來好好吃哦. (4) [Subtitle]: 像月餅的形狀. (5) [Subtitle]: 可可愛愛哦. (6) [Variety]: 那麼爆餡. (7) [Subtitle]: 你有看過像波堤一樣的大蒜乳酪乾酪球嗎. (8) [Variety]: 超級不好吃. (9) [Variety]: 乳酪的香味. (10) [Subtitle]: 就是不Q彈. (11) [Variety]: 回爐重造. (12) [Slogan]: 大家不要被踩雷啦.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 2 main female creators visible in the second half; 1 main creator in the first half.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: One woman has long dark hair in a brown top; the other has short dark hair, wearing a blue top and a grey bucket hat.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The first half is a Costco supermarket aisle with tall metal racks and pallets of goods. The second half is a domestic living room with a white table and blurred home background.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) Fast-paced electronic pop BGM starts immediately with a steady synthesizer beat. A young female voice speaks with high energy and rising intonation, introducing a food item. (2) A quick 'whoosh' SFX triggers as the scene shifts. A second female voice joins with a shorter, more melodic pitch contour. (3) A 'pop' bubble SFX sounds. The dominant speaker maintains a rapid speech rate with low pause density. (4) Background environment shifts to a quiet indoor room tone. A male voice, sounding like a post-production commentator or editor, adds a playful, deeper-pitched remark. (5) A 'ding' SFX coincides with the camera focusing on the food. The female voices shift to a more critical, slightly lower-arousal tone as they begin to review the texture. (6) A comedic 'stinger' SFX marks a narrative shift toward a negative verdict. The female voice exhibits higher vocal tension and emphatic falling intonation. (7) Final phase features a mix of cartoonish sound effects layered under the continuing upbeat music as the speakers warn against buying the product.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Introduction -> Discovery -> Testing -> Critical Review -> Final Warning
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To provide a critical review of a Costco food product, warning viewers that its physical quality and taste do not match the appealing packaging, effectively saving them from a 'bad purchase' (踩雷).

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video provides a highly critical and negative review, discouraging viewers from buying the product.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses typical social-media 'unboxing' tropes but flips them to deliver a warning. The contrast between the high-energy editing and the disappointed review creates a humorous effect.
